request: Restore generated Bengali and English polish audiobook candidates for future use while preserving release gates.
whyNotLive: Generated polish output is audio-focused and does not contain complete per-book legal/source-rights evidence.
Human listening QA, sync QA, accessibility QA, owner approval, legal review, and rollback evidence are not complete for the batch.
Public audio release remains intentionally blocked by launch governance.
Making 177 generated audio packages public would bypass current audiobook release gates.
safeNextSteps: Map each audio package to an approved reader book slug and cleaned manuscript source.
Run human listening QA and sync/highlight QA per title.
Upload audio to approved private/object storage only after owner/legal approval.
Promote one small pilot title first, not the full 177-title batch.
